hero.description: KPMG's Digital Foundation practice delivers enterprise-grade artificial intelligence — from strategy through implementation — to organizations shaping the Middle East's transformation.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Six integrated service pillars that take organizations from AI ambition to enterprise-scale impact.

readiness.title: AI Readiness Assessment
readiness.description: Evaluate your organization's maturity, infrastructure, talent, and governance readiness to adopt AI at scale.
readiness.details: A structured maturity assessment across five dimensions — strategy, data, talent, infrastructure, and governance — gives you an objective baseline benchmarked against regional and global peers, plus a prioritized action plan you can take straight to the board.

phases.name: Discover
phases.caption: Stakeholder interviews and document review across business and IT.

phases.name: Assess
phases.caption: Score five dimensions: strategy, data, talent, infrastructure, governance.

phases.name: Benchmark
phases.caption: Compare against regional and global peers in your sector.

phases.name: Roadmap
phases.caption: Prioritized 90-day, 6-month, and 12-month action plan.

bullets: Maturity scorecard benchmarked against industry peers
Capability gap analysis and target operating model
Prioritized 90-day, 6-month, and 12-month roadmap
Executive-ready briefing pack and governance recommendations

strategies.title: AI Strategies
strategies.description: Define a tailored AI roadmap aligned with your national and organizational objectives, from vision to execution.
strategies.details: We translate executive ambition into a concrete AI strategy aligned to national agendas and your sector's competitive realities — sequenced into a portfolio of use cases your teams can actually deliver, with the operating model and funding to back it.

phases.name: Frame
phases.caption: Co-create the AI ambition with your executive team and board.

phases.name: Prioritize
phases.caption: Rank use cases by value, feasibility, and risk.

phases.name: Architect
phases.caption: Define org structure, governance, funding, and partnerships.

phases.name: Sequence
phases.caption: Multi-year delivery roadmap with measurable KPIs and milestones.

bullets: Vision, ambition statement, and value-pool sizing
Use-case portfolio prioritized by feasibility and ROI
Operating model, governance, and funding blueprint
Multi-year delivery roadmap with measurable KPIs

platforms.title: AI Platforms
platforms.description: Design and implement enterprise-grade AI platforms that enable scalable model development, deployment, and monitoring.
platforms.details: We design and stand up the production-grade platform — MLOps, feature stores, vector databases, model serving, and observability — so your data-science teams can ship and operate dozens of models without re-inventing the plumbing for every project.

phases.name: Design
phases.caption: Reference architecture aligned to your cloud and security posture.

phases.name: Select
phases.caption: Choose the right MLOps, feature store, and serving stack.

phases.name: Build
phases.caption: Stand up registries, pipelines, and observability instrumentation.

phases.name: Operate
phases.caption: Enable the platform team with runbooks and SRE practices.

bullets: Reference architecture aligned to your cloud and security posture
MLOps, feature store, and vector-database stack selection
Model registry, serving, and observability instrumentation
Platform team enablement and operating runbooks

factories.title: AI Factories
factories.description: Operationalize AI delivery through industrialized, repeatable frameworks — from data pipelines to model lifecycle management.
factories.details: We industrialize AI delivery with reusable templates, shared components, and a lifecycle that takes ideas from prototype to production in weeks — not quarters — and keeps every model under continuous evaluation once it lands.

phases.name: Standardize
phases.caption: Codify lifecycle gates, quality bars, and documentation rules.

phases.name: Templatize
phases.caption: Build reusable pipelines, components, and project blueprints.

phases.name: Industrialize
phases.caption: Run delivery squads against shared components and patterns.

phases.name: Scale
phases.caption: Continuous evaluation and capability uplift across teams.

bullets: Standardized data, training, and deployment pipelines
Reusable component library and project blueprints
Lifecycle gates from discovery to retirement
Squad enablement and capability building

solutions.title: AI Solutions
solutions.description: Deliver purpose-built AI applications that solve real business problems — from intelligent automation to predictive analytics.
solutions.details: We build purpose-built AI applications — agents, copilots, predictive engines, and intelligent automations — targeted at the specific business problems where AI delivers measurable, repeatable value, and we run them all the way to production with continuous evaluation in place.

phases.name: Frame
phases.caption: Pinpoint the business problem, users, and success metrics.

phases.name: Build
phases.caption: Develop the agent, copilot, or predictive engine end-to-end.

phases.name: Validate
phases.caption: Pilot with real users and measure against the baseline.

phases.name: Deploy
phases.caption: Production rollout with monitoring and feedback loops.

bullets: Agentic copilots and domain-specific assistants
Predictive analytics and forecasting models
Intelligent document and content automation
Production deployment with continuous evaluation

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.description: Architect and manage secure, scalable cloud infrastructure — from migration strategy to multi-cloud governance and cost optimization.
cloud.details: We design, migrate, and operate cloud foundations — landing zones, networking, identity, FinOps, and multi-cloud governance — so your AI and data workloads run on a secure, cost-efficient base from day one and stay that way as they scale.

phases.name: Strategize
phases.caption: Cloud strategy, business case, and target operating model.

phases.name: Design
phases.caption: Secure landing zones, IAM, and network architecture.

phases.name: Migrate
phases.caption: Move workloads with the migration factory and modernize.

phases.name: Optimize
phases.caption: Ongoing FinOps, governance, and continuous cost optimization.

bullets: Cloud strategy, business case, and target architecture
Secure landing zones, IAM, and network design
Migration factory and workload modernization
FinOps, governance, and ongoing cost optimization

creativeContent.title: Creative Content Agent
creativeContent.description: AI-powered presentation builder that transforms briefs into polished, brand-compliant KPMG slide decks in seconds.
creativeContent.problem: Consultants spend hours hand-crafting decks for every client engagement — copying boilerplate slides, hunting for logos, and reformatting content to match brand guidelines. The result is wasted billable time and inconsistent visual quality.
creativeContent.solution: Creative Content Agent turns a short brief into a fully branded slide deck in seconds. It assembles slides from a curated KPMG template library, populates them with AI-generated narrative tuned to the brief, and enforces typography, colour, and layout rules so every output looks like it came from the same studio.

sahab.title: Sahab Data Platform
sahab.description: A centralized, governed data platform for ingestion, transformation, cataloging, and serving — built for Middle East enterprise scale.
sahab.problem: Enterprise data lives in dozens of disconnected systems, each with its own schema, refresh cadence, and access policy. Analytics teams spend more time wrangling pipelines than producing insights, and governance is enforced inconsistently — if at all.
sahab.solution: Sahab unifies ingestion, transformation, cataloging, and serving on a single governed substrate. Out-of-the-box connectors pull from common enterprise sources, lineage is captured automatically, and a central catalogue makes discovery and access requests a one-click flow — without sacrificing the controls regulators expect.

dataOwner.title: Data Owner Agent
dataOwner.description: An intelligent assistant that helps data owners manage classification, business definitions, quality rules, and PII detection across their data assets.
dataOwner.problem: Data ownership at scale is a thankless job: thousands of tables, no canonical definitions, ambiguous classification, and no easy way to spot PII before it leaks downstream. Owners default to manual spot-checks and stale spreadsheets.
dataOwner.solution: Data Owner Agent profiles assets continuously, suggests classifications and business definitions, flags PII candidates, and auto-generates quality rules from observed patterns. Owners review and approve in a single console — turning weeks of manual stewardship into hours of curation.

compliance.title: Compliance Platform
compliance.description: Automated regulatory compliance checker against regional frameworks (NDMO, PDPL, SAMA, DGA, SDAIA).
compliance.problem: Regional data and AI regulations (NDMO, PDPL, SAMA, DGA, SDAIA) overlap and evolve constantly. Compliance teams chase each new directive with manual gap assessments, leaving organizations exposed during the lag.
compliance.solution: The Compliance Platform encodes each framework as a machine-readable ruleset and runs continuous checks against your live policies, controls, and data flows. Findings come pre-mapped to the originating regulation, with remediation guidance and audit-ready evidence trails.

eaArch.title: EA Arch Agent
eaArch.description: An enterprise-architecture assistant that drafts target-state blueprints, traces capability-to-system mappings, and accelerates architecture reviews.
eaArch.problem: Enterprise architects burn weeks producing target-state diagrams, capability maps, and ADRs by hand. By the time the artefacts are reviewed, the underlying systems have already drifted — making the documents stale on arrival.
eaArch.solution: EA Arch Agent ingests your existing architecture inventory and generates target-state blueprints, capability-to-system mappings, and decision records in minutes. It keeps artefacts in lockstep with reality by re-running on schedule and flagging drift, so reviews focus on judgment, not redrawing boxes.

khda.title: KHDA Data Platform
khda.description: A purpose-built data platform for KHDA — ingesting, governing, and analyzing education-sector data to power policy and oversight.
khda.problem: Education-sector oversight requires consolidating data from hundreds of schools, training providers, and licensing systems — each reporting in different formats on different cadences. Manual consolidation delays insight and erodes confidence in published indicators.
khda.solution: The KHDA Data Platform standardizes ingestion across all reporting entities, applies KHDA-specific governance and quality rules, and exposes a unified analytical layer for policy teams and inspectors. Indicators are recomputed on every refresh, with full lineage from source to dashboard.

hints.deliverables: 4 capability statements rendered as check-mark cards.
